F: Stripe webhook integration caused signature verification failures ∵ middleware pre-read body stream → empty stream at handler; D: disabled body parsing on /webhooks/stripe route via dependency override @ 2023-10-04; F: initial suspects included stale webhook URL #1 and incorrect secret #2; W: FastAPI middleware consumed body stream before handler access → invalid signature verification; L: document this workaround to prevent future recurrence; F: fix required 1 hour of debugging after 3-4 failed attempts; C: Stripe docs specify raw byte-for-byte request body required for signature verification.

D: Vector store migration debate (sqlite-vec → pgvector) concluded yesterday afternoon; decision: retain sqlite-vec as Mnemos default config, ship pgvector as optional backend △ prior debate duration exceeded optimal  
F: Arguments for pgvector: existing Postgres deployment for app data, avoids separate embedded vector index maintenance  
F: Arguments for sqlite-vec: rock-solid reliability, zero-deployment (co-located with SQLite memory data), no multi-node vector search needed at current scale  
D: Final decision driven by zero-deployment being core feature for single-user Mnemos design ∵ aligns with system's target use case  
C: Mnemos vector backend options: [sqlite-vec (default), pgvector (optional)]  
W: Debate duration exceeded efficiency threshold (no quantified time metric provided)
